rulings.Case Title: FLORENTINO VILLANUEVA VS. GMAC MORTGAGE, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Gmacm'Snotice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Amend
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 30, 2012, line 3. GMAC Mortgage'S Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Amend Grant. Failed to file amended complaint; notice of entry of order re demurrer 9/22/11. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ESTRELLA ABALOS et al VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK TRUSTEE FOR STRUCTURED ASSET et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer To Complaint Filed By Defendants
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 30, 2012, line 5. Demurrer To Complaint Filed By Defendants Sustain demurrer with leave to amend in good faith. Plaintiff shall specify facts as to whom each cause of action(s) is directed and facts surrounding their occurances (who, what, when) (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA AS INDENTURED VS. NOEMI LYKKEBERG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Plaintiff'S Motion For Summary Judgment; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 30, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT NOEMI LYKKEBERG's Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Plaintiff'S Motion For Summary Judgment Deny. Moving party failed to show new facts and law. Also credibility issue. (501/REQ)
